completed_tasks.name: hotfixes.sql — job_specs grant already present; added DML grants for jobs, cars, sessions, job_photos, car_reminders
TuningPartsAddPage — removed user_id (column doesn't exist on jobs) and dead date-acquired field
TuningModDetailPage — handleRemove now captures and displays Supabase error instead of silent navigate-away on failure
TuningAddPage — ?dest=parts-bin mode: status=purchased, hides date_installed/installed_by, button says Add to Parts Bin, navigates to /tuning/parts-bin
TuningPartsPage — FAB now routes to /tuning/add?dest=parts-bin (full 3-step flow)
App.tsx + TuningPartsAddPage.tsx — removed dead route and deleted stripped-down add page

remaining_tasks.name: Run 5 grant statements in Supabase SQL editor — BLOCKED on human action
remaining_tasks.notes: Grants are in supabase/hotfixes.sql under '-- Fix missing DML grants on core user tables (2026-05-16)'. Must be run BEFORE testing remove-mod flow.

remaining_tasks.name: Test remove-mod → parts bin flow on gdimension.app
remaining_tasks.notes: Tap a mod on build sheet → mod detail → REMOVE → Move to Storage. Should succeed after grants are applied. Error message now surfaces in bottom sheet if it still fails.

remaining_tasks.name: Test Add Part via FAB on parts bin page
remaining_tasks.notes: Should now show full 3-step flow (category → part type → form). Submit says Add to Parts Bin. No date installed / installed by fields shown.

remaining_tasks.name: Test Put Back flow — tap Put Back on a parts bin item, verify it moves to build sheet
Review TuningAddPage still_owned — purchased parts added via ?dest=parts-bin should have still_owned=true
remaining_tasks.notes: Currently TuningAddPage does not set still_owned. Parts bin query filters on still_owned=true so purchased parts added via this flow won't appear in the parts bin list. Need to set still_owned:true when partsBinMode.

human_actions_pending.action: Run the 5 grant statements from supabase/hotfixes.sql in the Supabase SQL editor
human_actions_pending.context: Grants are under '-- Fix missing DML grants on core user tables (2026-05-16)'. Without these, PATCH/DELETE on jobs/cars/sessions will return 400. This is the root cause of the remove-mod error.

decisions.decision: Parts bin add routes through TuningAddPage with ?dest=parts-bin param instead of maintaining a separate page
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for the add-mod form. Parts bin entries have full parity with build sheet entries — same fields, same spec templates, same photo upload.

decisions.decision: Date Installed and Installed By hidden in parts-bin mode
decisions.rationale: A purchased-but-not-installed part has no install date or installer — those are set when the part actually goes on the car.

decisions.decision: Remove-mod error now shown in bottom sheet instead of silent failure
decisions.rationale: handleRemove was navigating away even on 400 errors, hiding the root cause from the user.

decisions.decision: Core table grants (jobs, cars, sessions, job_photos, car_reminders) added to hotfixes.sql
decisions.rationale: Same root cause as earlier job_specs grant — tables missing UPDATE/DELETE grants for authenticated role. SELECT/INSERT worked via Supabase default setup.

next_action: Have user run the 5 grant statements in Supabase SQL editor (from hotfixes.sql), then test the remove-mod flow on gdimension.app. Also fix still_owned=true not being set when adding via ?dest=parts-bin.
context_notes: All code is pushed and Vercel has deployed. The remove-mod 400 is almost certainly a missing UPDATE grant on jobs — the hotfix SQL is written and ready but must be run manually in the Supabase dashboard. One bug spotted but not yet fixed: TuningAddPage does not set still_owned=true in partsBinMode, so parts added via the FAB won't appear in the parts bin list (which queries still_owned=true). This is a one-line fix in TuningAddPage handleSubmit.
